list.title: Templates.
list.subtitle: Reusable firm prompts — case summary, clause analysis, due diligence. Insert them into a conversation in one click via the <icon></icon> icon.
list.emptyBody1: A template is a reusable prompt you insert into a conversation in one click. Create one from your practice — Louis ships no default templates; it's your firm that defines its library.
list.emptyBody2: Need inspiration? <link>Import legal skill templates</link> as a starting point — review and adapt them before using them.

add.title: New workflow
add.description: Give your template a name and write the prompt you'll want to reuse in the chat.
add.descriptionPlaceholder: Quick note on the template's use
add.promptPlaceholder: The text that will be inserted into the chat composer…

card.editDescription: Changes are available immediately from the chat composer.
card.deleteDescription: “{name}” will be permanently deleted. The prompt cannot be recovered.
